name: It's CK — YouTube
description: Filming the 52 Skills comeback arc. Currently producing philosophy and skill videos documenting what I've been learning and building over the past year. Comeback season.

name: AI Courses Deep Dive
description: Taking every free course from Anthropic Academy and Google AI. Expanding from conversational AI usage into API, automation, and agentic workflows.

name: 3D Printing
description: Learning parametric CAD in FreeCAD alongside the Bambu Lab P2S. Exploring magnetic builds, functional design, and the bridge between digital modeling and physical objects.

name: Academic Drawing
description: Cast drawing to life drawing progression. Learning to see before learning to render. Pencil on paper, classical tradition, no shortcuts.

name: Self-Hosted Photo Library (Immich)
description: Migrating years of photos off Google and onto personal infrastructure. Owning the archive of every moment Holly and I have captured together.

name: Cloud Backup (Backblaze B2)
description: Off-site backup for the homelab. 40TB of data needs a second copy that isn't in the same room.

name: Homelab Expansion
description: New Proxmox services and Docker containers. Expanding the Athenaeum.

name: Personal Website v2
description: Hugo rebuild. No templates, no CMS, no monthly subscription. Just markdown, a GitHub repo, and a color palette that means something.
